Package it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building

package it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building
  • Class
    Description
    BuilderDoublePP
    Building effect that doubles the final prestige points of every Builder card in the player's tribe.
    BuildingEffect
    Abstract base class for all building effects, providing a typed entry point that all concrete effects must implement.
    BuildingEffectInterface
    Strategy interface for building effects.
    DiscountFoodOnSustenance
    Building effect that reduces the food cost of the sustenance event by awarding one food per tribe member of the configured card type.
    DoublePPOnShamanEvent
    Building effect that doubles any prestige points gained during a shamanic ritual event.
    DrawOneMoreCard
    Building effect that entitles the player to draw one extra card per round from the top list.
    FoodOnNewCoupleInventors
    Building effect that awards 3 food for each new pair of Inventor cards sharing the same icon added to the tribe since the last time this effect was evaluated.
    NoPPLostOnShaman
    Building effect that prevents the player from losing prestige points during a shamanic ritual event.
    OnEventHuntOneFoodAndOnePPPerHunter
    Building effect triggered during a hunt event: awards 1 food plus 1 prestige point per Hunter card in the player's tribe.
    OnEventPaintingsOneFoodPerArtist
    Building effect triggered during a paintings (artist) event: awards 1 food per Artist card in the player's tribe.
    PlusOneFoodOnReturnDefaultTile
    Building effect that awards 1 extra food when the player returns to a default tile whose food reward is non-negative (i.e.
    PPPerCharType
    Building effect that awards a fixed number of prestige points for each tribe member of a specified card type at end of game (or the configured trigger).
    SetSixCard
    Building effect that awards 6 prestige points for each complete set of one of each of the six tribe-card types that was added since the last evaluation.
    SixFoodCompletedSet
    Building effect that awards 5 food each time the player completes a full set of one of each of the six tribe-card types across the entire game.
    ThreeMoreShamanStar
    Building effect that temporarily adds a 3-star Shaman card to the player's tribe before a shamanic ritual event, then removes it afterwards.
    TwentyFivePPEndGame
    Building effect that awards 25 prestige points at the end of the game.
